name: Croc-Embossed Crossbody
description: Elegant brown croc-embossed leather crossbody with gold hardware and detachable mini pouch. Perfect for everyday luxury.

name: Quilted Chain Shoulder Bag
description: Classic quilted shoulder bag with gold chain strap and turn-lock closure. Timeless sophistication for every occasion.

name: Textured Flap Satchel
description: Structured flap satchel with textured leather finish and gold-tone clasp. A refined statement piece.

name: Mini Envelope Clutch
description: Sleek mini envelope clutch with magnetic closure. Compact elegance for evening outings.

name: Ruched Handle Tote
description: Sophisticated tote with soft ruched top handle and structured body. The ultimate day-to-night companion.

name: White Medallion Handbag
description: Pristine white handbag with ornate gold medallion clasp and croc-embossed detailing. Pure luxury.

name: Heart Clasp Chevron Bag
description: Romantic chevron-quilted bag with signature heart clasp and satin ruched handle. A charming piece.

name: Duo-Tone Structured Bag
description: Modern black-and-white structured bag with clean geometric lines. Bold yet refined.

name: Gold Buckle Crossbody
description: Chic crossbody with oversized gold buckle and adjustable strap. Effortless luxury on the go.

name: Beige Croc Shoulder Bag
description: Luxurious beige croc-embossed shoulder bag with geometric clasp and matching coin purse.

name: Pearl Handle Evening Bag
description: Exquisite evening bag with pearl-studded handle and gold chain. Perfect for special occasions.

name: Chain Link Flap Bag
description: Elegant flap bag with woven chain link strap and magnetic closure. Understated glamour.

name: Lace Pearl Clutch
description: Delicate lace overlay clutch with pearl bead handle and gold frame. A bridal favourite.

name: Silver Bow Frame Clutch
description: Glittering silver fabric clutch with crystal bow frame and detachable chain. Red carpet ready.

name: Blush Pink Tote Set
description: Three-piece blush pink tote set with tassel accents and gold hardware. Complete your collection.

name: Marble Effect Handbag
description: Unique marble-effect leather handbag with structured silhouette. A conversation starter.

name: Vintage Clasp Doctor Bag
description: Vintage-inspired doctor bag with ornate clasp and top carry handle. Old-world charm meets modern style.

name: Gold Accent Messenger
description: Compact messenger bag with brushed gold accent plate and adjustable crossbody strap.

name: Ribbon Bow Mini Bag
description: Adorable mini bag with oversized ribbon bow detail. Sweet and sophisticated.

name: Emerald Velvet Clutch
description: Rich emerald velvet clutch with jewelled clasp. The perfect statement for evening wear.

name: Woven Leather Bucket Bag
description: Artisanal woven leather bucket bag with drawstring closure. Effortless bohemian luxury.

name: Crystal Clasp Minaudière
description: Dazzling minaudière with crystal-encrusted clasp and satin lining. For nights that sparkle.

name: Caramel Saddle Bag
description: Warm caramel saddle bag with curved flap and antique brass hardware. Western elegance redefined.
